name: Measured
description: AI-powered marketing effectiveness platform combining incrementality experiments, MMM and automation.

seo.title: Measured — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Measured: AI-powered marketing effectiveness platform combining incrementality experiments, MMM and automation.

when_to_use: AI-powered incrementality testing and MMM for channel ROI validation
Automating holdout experiment design and analysis for media teams
Marketing effectiveness platform combining experiments and models for brands
Validating paid UA incremental lift across Meta, TikTok, and Google

pros: Incrementality experiments built into the platform
Good coverage across digital and offline channels
Strong services layer for strategy support
cons: Pricing aimed at established mid-market and up
Model outputs can lag real-time decisions
review.verdict: Credible incrementality plus MMM platform for established brands, but expect a measurement layer, not an MMP.
review.best_for: Mid-market and enterprise brands wanting managed incrementality plus MMM with services.
review.not_for: Startups or mobile-only teams needing cheap, real-time install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
